sections.markdown:
- Activity: Evening Run
- Started: 2025-08-14 18:14
- Distance: 5.5 km
- Moving time: 28:07
- Elapsed time: 28:16
- Elevation gain: 24.6 m
- Average heart rate: 163 bpm
- Max heart rate: 175 bpm
- Average watts: 237.1 W
- Average speed: 11.8 km/h
- Apple Health recorded `3` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `166.6 bpm`, ranging from `156.9` to `171.9 bpm`.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `174.0 spm`, with a working range of `168.5` to `176.6 spm` after excluding `1` start-stop outlier below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `172.7 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `175.1 spm` (+2.4 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:06 /km` across `5.520 km` in `28:07` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:10 /km` and second-half pace was `5:01 /km` (-8 s/km), so pace picked up through the second half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `163.0 bpm` average and `175 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `156.1 bpm` in the first half and `170.4 bpm` in the second (+14.4 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `28:07` out of `28:16` elapsed (99.5%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `3` stop segments and `0.4%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `43.2 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `4.0 m` and `10.8 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `20.0 m` in the first half and `23.2 m` in the second, so the climbing load was split fairly evenly.
